name: Fatty Acid Synthesis
description: Fatty acid synthesis: cytosolic acetyl-CoA is carboxylated to malonyl-CoA (ACC, committed step), and fatty acid synthase iterates condensation-reduction-dehydration-reduction cycles on ACP, adding two carbons per round until palmitate is released.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Cytosolic acetyl-CoA"]
    N2["ACC -> malonyl-CoA"]
    N3["Load onto ACP"]
    N4["Condensation (KS)"]
    N5["Reduction (NADPH)"]
    N6["Dehydration"]
    N7["Reduction (NADPH)"]
    N8{"Reached C16?"}
    N9["Palmitate released"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|< C16: add 2C| N4
    N8 -->|C16| N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.
